description_long: This is a square wooden picket fence enclosure, constructed from vertical planks with pointed tops, arranged in a repeating pattern. The fence features a symmetrical design, with the central section of each side rising higher than the adjacent planks, creating a peaked effect. The wood appears weathered, with a dark brown finish and visible grain texture, suggesting outdoor use. The posts at the corners and midpoints are slightly thicker, providing structural support. The enclosure is open at the top and has no visible gate or entry mechanism. The overall appearance is rustic and utilitarian, suitable for gardens, yards, or small animal enclosures in urban or suburban settings.
description: A square, rustic wooden picket fence with pointed tops and a peaked central design on each side, made from weathered brown planks.
description_view_0: Front view showing the symmetrical peaked design at the center of the fence and the pointed tops of the pickets.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the depth of the enclosure and the uniformity of the picket spacing.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with the same peaked central section and pointed pickets visible.
description_view_3: Angled side view from the opposite direction, again showing the enclosure's depth and the consistent picket arrangement.
